quote: A journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: Whether you think you can or you can't, you're right.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Any time not spent on love is wasted.
author: Torquato Tasso

quote: In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: If you tell the truth, you don't have to remember anything.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Genius is one percent inspiration, ninety-nine percent perspiration.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Man is still the most extraordinary computer of all.
author: John F. Kennedy

quote: No one can make you feel inferior without your consent.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Buy land — they're not making it anymore.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Early to bed, early to rise, makes a man healthy, wealthy, and wise.
author: Ben Franklin

quote: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
author: Wayne Gretzky

quote: You know you're in love when you can't fall asleep because reality is finally better than your dreams.
author: Dr. Seuss

quote: I find that when you have a real interest in life, and a curious life, that sleep is not the most important thing.
author: Martha Stewart

quote: For sale: baby shoes, never worn.
author: Ernest Hemingway

quote: Don't ask me how to get started, it's all uncharted.
author: Sara Bareilles

quote: The secret to creativity is knowing how to hide your sources.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Be thankful we're not getting all the government we're paying for.
author: Will Rogers

quote: We burn the fat off our souls.
author: Ernest Hemingway

quote: The man who does not read has no advantage over the man who cannot read.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Ask not what your country can do for you. Ask what you can do for your country.
author: John F. Kennedy

quote: One man with courage is a majority.
author: Andrew Jackson

quote: I have never let schooling interfere with my education.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Imagination is more important than knowledge.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Logic will get you from A to B. Imagination will take you everywhere.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Give a man a fish and you feed him for a day. Teach a man to fish and you feed him for a lifetime.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: Every artist was once an amateur.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: I have not failed. I have just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: The world needs dreams, and the world needs doers, but above all, the world needs dreamers who do.
Work hard and be kind, and amazing things will happen.
author: Conan O'Brien

quote: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
author: Aristotle

quote: Rules are for the obedience of fools and the guidance of wise men.
author: Douglas Bader
